name: aems
description: Automated Email Management System - Production Bundle

scripts.pkg:build:win: npm run build && pkg . --targets node18-win-x64 --config pkg.config.json
scripts.pkg:build:mac: npm run build && pkg . --targets node18-macos-x64,node18-macos-arm64 --config pkg.config.json
scripts.pkg:build:linux: npm run build && pkg . --targets node18-linux-x64,node18-linux-arm64 --config pkg.config.json
